codeReview.summary: All 7 code quality items from M3 scrutiny are well addressed. The deduplication of draw_tt_sel/draw_tt_sel_scroll is clean (delegation pattern, ~80 lines removed). Compositor null-checks handle OOM gracefully with proper conditional deallocation. SVG parser leading-decimal fix is correct — is_digit_or_sign extended, parse_svg_number handles missing integer part. Overflow documentation in svg_coord_to_fp is thorough with specific safe-range numbers. Test additions are meaningful boundary cases. Stale docstring and test rename are straightforward fixes.

issues.description: parse_svg_number now accepts a bare '.' (no digits at all) as valid, returning 0. This is extremely unlikely in real SVG data but is a minor leniency in parsing. Not worth a code change — just noting for awareness.

When path_ptr alloc fails but scratch_ptr is set to null_mut() directly, the code still prints the scratch OOM message if path was null (because of the condition '!path_ptr.is_null() && scratch_ptr.is_null()' — this won't fire since path_ptr IS null). Actually on re-read this is correct — the second message only prints if path succeeded but scratch failed. No issue.

codeQuality.summary: Excellent cleanup commit. All 7 items addressed thoroughly with well-structured tests, clear documentation, and clean deduplication. No blocking issues. The draw_tt_sel delegation pattern is the right approach — simpler than extracting a shared helper. OOM handling in compositor is defensive and graceful.

issuesFound.description: parse_svg_number accepts bare '.' as 0 — extremely unlikely edge case, acceptable leniency for an SVG parser.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md states test baseline is 847 tests, but this commit reports 838 tests passing (826 + 12 new). The baseline number may need updating or reconciliation — it's possible the 847 number includes prototype tests (826 system + 21 prototype = 847), and the worker only ran system tests (838 = 826 + 12 new). If so, AGENTS.md's '847 tests' is correct as a total but the system-only count is now 838.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md says '847 tests must pass at all times (826 system + 21 prototype)'. Handoff says '838 tests passed' from system/test only. 826 + 12 new = 838 system tests. So total should now be 838 system + 21 prototype = 859.

summary: All 7 M3 scrutiny cleanup items are fully addressed: scroll tests strengthened with 10 boundary-case assertions (4 for byte_to_visual_line, 5 for scroll_for_cursor), text-editor IPC docstring updated with 4 missing message types, compositor SVG alloc null-checks added with graceful OOM handling, draw_tt_sel duplication eliminated via delegation to draw_tt_sel_scroll, SVG parser handles leading-decimal numbers, i32 overflow limits thoroughly documented in svg_coord_to_fp, and misleading test name corrected. 12 net new tests, ~80 lines of duplication removed, clean build. Pass.
